_comment: AgriSync Voice Retained Storage - Backend Role IAM Policy Template
Replace <ACCOUNT_ID> with your 12-digit AWS account ID.
Attach to the backend execution role only (e.g. role/agrisync-backend-${env}).
The Bootstrapper resolves env credentials at startup; no per-developer creds.
- Bucket ARN (for ListBucket / GetBucketLocation): no trailing /*
ACTIONS (closed list — verifier ensures no s3:* widening):
PutObjectAcl    -> ACLs disabled by bucket-owner-enforced (object ACLs blocked).
PutBucketPolicy -> Bucket policy authored once via Kiro, not by runtime role.
RestoreObject   -> No Glacier in v1 (lifecycle-policy.json is NoOp).
AAD (after-the-fact defence): bucket-policy.json denies any PutObject without
SSE-S3 header, even if a future role drift accidentally widens permissions.
